title: Chapter 114
content:

After she had done that, Denzel picked up a bowl of stew and carried it over to the dining table.

Sophia, who had only been expecting to find Maria waiting in the kitchen, looked at the two of them in surprise.

"Oh? What did you make?"

Denzel smiled.

"You wouldn’t believe it. Mum is an excellent chef."

Maria immediately let out a soft chuckle at his words before quickly turning away, her cheeks still carrying a faint blush. Even so, she did her best to act as though everything was perfectly normal.

"I just finished the stew. Do you want yours now?"

By that point, Denzel had already taken a seat.

In no time at all, he finished his bowl of stew.

Once he was done, he stood up, took his plate away, and after getting dressed and making sure everything was ready, he picked up a small pouch containing only a little water.

When he reached the door, he turned back toward Maria and Sophia, who were busy washing the dishes.

"I need to run an errand. Don’t worry, I’ll be back before sunset."

He took one last glance at Maria.

’Now I most definitely have a reason to come back.’

"Love you guys."

With that, he opened the door, stepped outside, and shut it behind him.

Letting out a quiet sigh, he straightened himself before beginning to walk, calmly making his way toward his destination.

Toward his duel with Patrick.
